description: Create a three-column content slide titled Highlights from past EY/IIF risk management surveys, comparing the 1st, 5th, and 10th annual surveys with text summaries and horizontal bar charts for the first two columns.

header.headline: Highlights from past EY/IIF risk management surveys

left.title: 1st annual — Recover, adapt, advance: back to business in an uncertain world
left.body: Survey respondents consistently expressed the view that companies underestimated the vital importance of the human factor in managing risk. To institute and reinforce a strong risk culture, risk must become everyone’s business, from boards to front-line decision-makers.

center.title: 5th annual — Shifting focus: risk culture at the forefront of banking
center.body: Driven by continuing high-profile conduct failings and growing pressure from regulators to tighten controls on risk behavior, there is an industry-wide effort to more effectively manage risk culture.

right.title: 10th annual — An endurance course: surviving and thriving through 10 major risks over the next decade
right.body: There has been a lot of progress over the decade. Today, globally, banks are much better positioned in terms of capital and liquidity ... Risk leaders and their teams have been innovating approaches to new, or newly emphasized, nonfinancial risks ... Managing risk over the next decade could prove to be much more challenging.

labels: Enhancing communication and training regarding risk values and expectations
Aligning compensation with risk-adjusted performance metrics
main.title: Selected survey findings
